title: [Epic] Add review timestamps to Markdown documentation
body: Add timestamps to the footer of the MD files to indicate when they were last updated and reviewed. This will help manage the documentation more efficiently.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #1: Add timestamps to root Markdown files
issues.body: Add 'Last Updated' and 'Last Reviewed' timestamps to the footer of the root-level documentation files such as README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, PRIVACY.md, SECURITY.md, etc.

issues.title: Sub-Issue #2: Add timestamps to docs/ directory Markdown files
issues.body: Add 'Last Updated' and 'Last Reviewed' timestamps to the footer of the Markdown files located within the `docs/` and `docs/server/` directories.
